rows.label: qst201007_msg0002
rows.name:
'Recently, incidents have occurred
in various countries: people attacked
and Core Crystals stolen.'

rows.label: qst201007_msg0003
rows.name:
'Commonly called Core Crystal
hunting, a similar incident
occurred in Gula the other day.'

rows.label: qst201007_msg0004
rows.name:
'The Security Department is currently
investigating, but the culprit has
not yet been identified.'

rows.label: qst201007_msg0005
rows.name:
'If you see suspicious individuals,
please contact Security Department
at Superbian Army's Torigo Base.'
